description: You are a product marketing manager. Using the data from 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\sales_data.csv', create a Power BI report named 'Small_Multiples_Report.pbix' and save it to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\'. The report must feature a page named 'Category Comparison' containing a Line Chart of 'Sales_Amount' over 'Sale_Date' split into small multiples by 'Product_Category', a Clustered Bar Chart of 'Sales_Amount' by 'Region' split into small multiples by 'Customer_Type', and a Card visual displaying a DAX measure named 'Avg_Sale_Value' defined as DIVIDE(SUM(sales_data[Sales_Amount]), COUNTROWS(sales_data)). Login as 'Docker' with no password.
